visual.name: multiDonutPieChart3D
visual.description: A professional, dynamic 2D/3D Donut and Pie chart with multi-ring (concentric) support. Features per-category color customization, rich tooltips, context menu, cross-filtering and a fully organized formatting pane.

dataRoles.name: category
dataRoles.description: Categories that define the slices of the chart.

dataRoles.name: details
dataRoles.description: Optional sub-categories used to split each slice (enables multiple concentric rings).

dataRoles.name: measure
dataRoles.description: One or more numeric measures. Each measure becomes a concentric ring when 'Multiple Rings' is enabled.

dataRoles.name: tooltips
dataRoles.description: Additional fields shown in the tooltip.

dimension.description: Switch between flat 2D rendering and a 3D rendering with depth.

multipleRings.description: Render multiple concentric rings (one per measure or per Details group).

ringSpacing.description: Gap between concentric rings as a percentage of ring width.

innerRadiusPct.description: Inner radius for donuts as a percentage of outer radius (0–95).

startAngle.description: Starting angle of the first slice in degrees.

gaugeMode.description: KPI / progress mode. Mark category names as background and add a curved label per ring.

backgroundCategories.description: Comma-separated category names rendered but excluded from the legend and data labels (case-insensitive, e.g. 'Remaining, Remaining Percentage').

source.description: Choose what the displayed legend lists. Affects the legend only, not the chart slices or colors.

centerLabel.description: Visible only when shape is Donut.

auto.description: When on, shows the sum of values automatically.
